candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue measure; clearly labeled as total revenue and appears as the main sales figure.
Financial/interest income, not operating revenue; should not be used as top-line sales.
Interest income component of financial income; not operating revenue.
Aggregate of non-operating items; not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income/(loss) for the period
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Explicit cost of goods sold line; matches direct production costs definition.
More general operating overhead; likely part of SG&A, not pure COGS, though some personnel could be in COGS.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Clearly classified within SG&A, not COGS.
Broad operating overhead bucket; includes SG&A-type costs rather than direct COGS.
Net operating measure; not a pure COGS component.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Specific lease-related operating cost; part of overhead, not core COGS line.
Lease related expense; not the primary COGS line.
Typical SG&A component representing personnel-related overhead.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly labeled as SG&A stock-based compensation; classic SG&A component.
Bucket of operating overhead expenses; largely SG&A in nature.
Equity component related to share-based comp; not an income statement SG&A expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Selected multiple operating overhead components from the Income Statement as SG&A, excluding any totals and non-IS equity items.
No research and development related line items (R&D, research, development) are visible in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews, so XRD is treated as missing/zero.

candidates.why: Main interest expense line, negative values; primary choice for finance cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest portion of lease liabilities; a component of interest expense when main line may be absent for some years.
Clarifies non-lease portion of interest; very relevant where it is reported.
Capitalized rather than expensed interest; not pure period interest expense but related.
Represents minority interest share of profit; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; secondary backup label for interest costs.
Equity line for minority interests; not an interest expense.
Duplicate labeling of non-controlling interests; equity, not interest expense.
Debt balance, not an expense line.
Short-term debt balance; not an expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list of interest expense labels, preferring the most specific non-lease line, then the aggregate, then lease-related components.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit, not a balance sheet equity stock; unsuitable for BE numerator of (BE+MIB).

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not the equity balance.
Component of equity; not complete shareholder equity.
Represents total equity attributable to shareholders (owners) excluding non-controlling interests, matching BE definition well.
Includes both shareholders and non-controlling interests; less ideal because BE should exclude NCI.

variables.notes: Shareholders' Equity - Total is used as equity attributable to owners, while non-controlling interests are mapped separately to MIB.

candidates.why: Represents minority interest share of profit; confirms presence of non-controlling interests but not the balance sheet stock.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; best match for MIB as equity attributable to minority shareholders.
Alternative label for non-controlling interests with identical figures; useful as backup if primary label missing in some periods.

variables.notes: Mapped MIB to the balance sheet non-controlling interests line, with the synonymous Minority Interest label as backup for historical periods.
